Articles

Getting started

Getting started with hypnoR

Worked examples

Cleaning up and interpreting real staging: a worked example with mrpheus

A warts-and-all walkthrough of taking mrpheus’s raw automatic staging output through hypnoR’s full pipeline, using the same SC4001 recording as mrpheus’s own sleep-staging-demo article. Along the way: why the raw hypnogram looks messier than a textbook figure, whether that’s a bug, smoothing, windowing, and comparing cycle-detection methods.

On this page

hypnoR — Circadia Lab, Northumbria University. Lucas França & Mario Leocadio-Miguel.
